_about: 3 kg generic QuadPlane — ue_physics backend. Same plant as sitl_default (mass, inertia, aero) but UE provides physics via JSON bridge instead of ArduPilot's built-in model. Use this for validating the UE physics path before moving to real vehicles (gokce).
_backend_doc: ue_physics = ArduPilot runs --model JSON; UE UVTOLPhysicsComponent integrates all forces and sends state back each tick. Motors on SERVO1-4 in params.parm.
_stability_doc: Stability derivatives, added 2026-06-10 PM2 after the first fixed-wing leg diverged in pitch (±4° growing to a -85° dive in 16 s): with moments only from control surfaces the airframe was aerodynamically neutral and AP's plane PIDs pumped it. cm_alpha -1.0 with cl_alpha 6.9 ≈ 15% static margin; short-period at 15 m/s: wn=3.3 rad/s, zeta≈0.5 (incl. rotational_damping 3.0). Trim elevator at 25 m/s cruise: 6.4° of 20°.
_min_airspeed_doc: Aero fade-in threshold: zero below 4 m/s, full wing forces at 8 m/s. Was 15.0 — broken: AIRSPEED_MIN is 13, so AP could command wing-borne flight at speeds where UE produced zero wing forces. 8.0 matches gokce/sitl_default and the FixedWingAeroComponent default.
